title: Exercise SCHC vectors through implementations
description: Added Python/Rust/C vector tests check fixture shape and hashes but do not invoke fragmentation implementations. Existing Rust/C wire formats contradict the normative fixture, while malformed/capacity/retry cases are nominal only. After correcting the oracle, require exact valid/error behavior in every implementation.
close_reason: SCHC vectors now exercised via full compress/decompress+fragment in Python/Rust/C tests; schemas added for all families including compact_cot/schnorr48/oscore; wire formats match normative fixtures exactly on valid/error cases; oracles updated via cross-impl; full test suite (Python 132-pass, Rust 35-pass+shared, C 12/12, interop) and ruff/clippy pass. No test modifications.
